title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Future Retail

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Future Retail
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Future Retail! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Ghaziabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Future Retail:
Future Retail is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Future Retail!
